creator: ports.maintainer@evilphi.com
text: On further reflection, in no small part due to the time wasted on a bikeshed, I've decided I no longer care about this PR.  I'm going to hack a fake ca_root_nss with an empty ca-root-nss.crt file and install that on everything as a locked, local-repo pkg so it never updates and doesn't pollute certctl's domain.
